displayTitle: Doctor Aphra (2016) #35: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon Part IV
synopsis:
**Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon, Part IV**

It's time for Doctor Aphra to do what she does best: honor her commitments, help people in need, do the right thing. Hahaha, nope, the people she's swindling won't buy that either. Unlucky for them, she's always two steps ahead. Unlucky for her, the steps lead directly to Coruscant, and into the arms of an old enemy.
title: Doctor Aphra (2016) #35: Unspeakable Rebel Superweapon Part IV
